raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I bought a vacuum cleaner for {$590.00} from Best Buy on XX/XX/XXXX. They lowered the price down to three XXXX for the same vacuum. Ive asked them to reimburse me the {$200.00} since it was less than a month after I bought it and they are refusing to do so. Ive disputed the charges twice to no avail.
